title: Flickering Fireflies + Green
body:
Makes the Firefly particles in the 1.21.5 "Spring to Life" update more immersive by allowing them to **FLICKER**!! 
(Best with shaders!)

_Feel free to copy and paste the files containing them into your own resource pack folder._

![It flickers trust me](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/946d6d90164d705ae59fe7d882f9ac3a9fdd19d8.png)
